description_long: This is a round, orange, plastic instant ramen bowl with a tightly sealed lid, featuring vibrant printed graphics and Chinese text. The lid is embossed with a decorative pattern and product branding, while the sides display nutritional information, preparation instructions, and appetizing images of the ramen. The container is robust and slightly translucent, with a wide mouth and reinforced rim for easy handling. The graphics include images of vegetables and beef, suggesting a savory flavor profile. The bowl is designed for single-serving convenience, typical of instant noodle packaging found in urban convenience stores. The overall appearance is bright, eye-catching, and practical for on-the-go consumption.
description: A bright orange, round plastic instant ramen bowl with a sealed lid, detailed graphics, and product branding. The container is sturdy, portable, and designed for convenient single-serving use.
description_view_0: This view highlights the top of the bowl, showing the embossed lid with colorful branding and a partial view of the side graphics.
description_view_1: The front label is fully visible, displaying the main product name and appetizing food imagery, with clear branding and nutritional highlights.
description_view_2: The back of the bowl is shown, featuring a large block of text (likely ingredients or instructions) and various certification and recycling symbols.
description_view_3: This side view presents the product name and branding prominently, with a partial glimpse of the nutritional and preparation information.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is made of orange plastic with a wide, round shape and a reinforced, slightly raised rim. The exterior is decorated with printed graphics, including product branding, food imagery, and nutritional information, all in vibrant colors. The lid is embossed with a decorative pattern and features a secure, snap-on design.
attribute_topping_arrangement: No toppings are visible as the bowl is sealed with its lid, and the printed images on the exterior suggest a mix of vegetables and beef arranged attractively in the product depiction. The arrangement on the packaging shows toppings grouped in a visually appealing manner, but the actual contents are not visible.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are not visible, as the bowl is fully sealed with its lid. Only printed images on the packaging suggest the presence of noodles inside.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth itself is not visible due to the sealed lid. The printed images on the packaging depict a rich, opaque broth with visible ingredients.
attribute_utensil_presence: No utensils are present in or around the bowl in the images. The packaging does not display or include any visible chopsticks, spoons, or forks.
